title: Validate UI State Changes for Pause and Cancel
description: Tests that UI components correctly reflect the user's trial status after pausing or canceling.

steps.description: 1. Navigate to the 'Trial Corner' and click 'Pause Trial'.
2. Confirm the pause action in the pop-up.
3. Verify the homepage widget updates to a 'paused' design and copy.
4. Verify the Trial Corner shows content sections as locked.
5. Follow the steps to cancel the trial.
6. Verify the homepage widget updates to a 'cancelled' design and copy.
7. Verify the Trial Corner still shows content sections as locked.

expected_result: The UI on both the homepage (widget) and the Trial Corner (locked content) accurately and immediately reflects the current trial status (Paused, then Cancelled).
